candidate.title: Add source-backed data, RAG, and vector infrastructure coverage

local_checks.raw_manifest_scan: find/rg scan of personal-wiki/domains/ai_infra/raw found no dedicated Milvus, Qdrant, Weaviate, pgvector, FAISS, vector database, RAG data-infrastructure, or embedding-pipeline corpus. Matches were limited to the Hitchhiker arXiv capture, unrelated compute accelerator storage text, and pre-existing baseline-dirty compute captures that are explicitly out of scope.
local_checks.wiki_search: rg scan of personal-wiki/domains/ai_infra/wiki found no dedicated vector database, Milvus, Qdrant, Weaviate, pgvector, FAISS, embedding pipeline, or data/RAG infrastructure page. Existing hits were coverage-map gap text, Hitchhiker paper context, and generic retrieval notes in unrelated corpus pages.
local_checks.domain_index_scan: personal-wiki/domains/ai_infra/wiki/index.md had no data-rag-vector reference page before this task; only the Hitchhiker paper was indexed for the weak data-rag-vector layer.

gap_reason: coverage-map.json marked data-rag-vector as weak and cited only the Hitchhiker paper. The planner required primary system sources for vector database, retrieval, and embedding-index infrastructure; local duplicate checks found no curated primary corpus for that layer.

duplicate_policy.excluded_reason: Pre-existing untracked 20260706 compute accelerator crawler captures are hardware-accelerator evidence and were not staged, curated, or used as source evidence for this data-rag-vector task.

selected_sources.name: Milvus Architecture Overview
selected_sources.reason: Primary architecture evidence for distributed vector database proxy, coordinator, worker, storage, WAL, sealed/growing data, and index-build flow.

selected_sources.name: Qdrant Indexing Documentation
selected_sources.reason: Primary evidence for dense HNSW, payload indexes, filterable HNSW, full-text payload indexing, sparse vectors, and memory/disk index placement.

selected_sources.name: Weaviate Vector Indexing Documentation
selected_sources.reason: Primary evidence for HNSW, flat, dynamic, HFresh, memory footprint, asynchronous indexing, and small-collection tradeoffs.

selected_sources.name: pgvector README
selected_sources.reason: Primary evidence for PostgreSQL-native vector storage, exact search, HNSW, IVFFlat, distance operators, filtering behavior, and relational integration.

selected_sources.name: FAISS README and indexes wiki
selected_sources.reason: Primary library evidence for dense-vector similarity search, flat/HNSW/IVF/PQ index families, compression, CPU/GPU support, and scale/search tradeoffs.

link_probe_evidence.method: main-environment curl HEAD probes plus browser retrieval for official primary URLs
link_probe_evidence.notes: Qdrant, Weaviate, pgvector, FAISS README, and FAISS indexes wiki returned HTTP 200 from the main shell. Milvus returned HTTP 403/challenge to shell probes from the current network, but the official URL remains recorded and was readable through the browser retrieval channel during curation.
